allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const css=fs.readFileSync\('dist/styles.css','utf8'\); const re=/\\/\\*[\\s!]*@settings\\s*\\n\([\\s\\S]*?\)\\*\\//g; let m; while\(m=re.exec\(css\)\){ const block=m[1]; const name=\(block.match\(/name:\\s*\(.+\)/\)||[]\)[1]||'?'; const id=\(block.match\(/\\bid:\\s*\(.+\)/\)||[]\)[1]||'?'; const count=\(block.match\(/\(?m\)^\\s*-\\s*$|^\\s*-\\s+id:/g\)||[]\).length; console.log\(name.trim\(\)+' \(id: '+id.trim\(\)+'\) -> '+count+' settings'\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const css=fs.readFileSync\('dist/styles.css','utf8'\); const re=/\\/\\*[\\s!]*@settings\\s*\\n\([\\s\\S]*?\)\\*\\//g; let m; while\(m=re.exec\(css\)\){ const block=m[1]; const name=\(block.match\(/name:\\s*\(.+\)/\)||[]\)[1]||'?'; const id=\(block.match\(/\\bid:\\s*\(.+\)/\)||[]\)[1]||'?'; const count=\(block.match\(/^\\s*-\\s*$/gm\)||[]\).length + \(block.match\(/^\\s*-\\s+id:/gm\)||[]\).length; console.log\(name.trim\(\)+' \(id: '+id.trim\(\)+'\) -> '+count+' settings'\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const css=fs.readFileSync\('dist/styles.css','utf8'\); const re=/\\/\\*[\\s!]*@settings\\s*\\n\([\\s\\S]*?\)\\*\\//g; let m; while\(m=re.exec\(css\)\){ const block=m[1]; const name=\(block.match\(/name:\\s*\(.+\)/\)||[]\)[1]||'?'; const id=\(block.match\(/\\bid:\\s*\(.+\)/\)||[]\)[1]||'?'; const count=\(block.match\(/^\\s+id:\\s+/gm\)||[]\).length; console.log\(name.trim\(\)+' \(id: '+id.trim\(\)+'\) -> '+count+' settings'\); }")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const css=fs.readFileSync\('dist/styles.css','utf8'\); const re=/\\/\\*[\\s!]*@settings\\s*\\n\([\\s\\S]*?\)\\*\\//g; let m; let total=0; while\(m=re.exec\(css\)\){ const block=m[1]; const name=\(block.match\(/name:\\s*\(.+\)/\)||[]\)[1]||'?'; const id=\(block.match\(/\\bid:\\s*\(.+\)/\)||[]\)[1]||'?'; const count=\(block.match\(/^        id:\\s+/gm\)||[]\).length; total+=count; console.log\(name.trim\(\)+' \(id: '+id.trim\(\)+'\) -> '+count+' settings'\); } console.log\('TOTAL: '+total+' settings across 10 groups'\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const js=fs.readFileSync\('OriginalFile/彩虹文件夹列表/main.js','utf8'\); const lines=js.split\('\\n'\); console.log\('Total lines:', lines.length\); const idx=lines.findIndex\(l=>l.includes\('style-settings-heading'\)\); if\(idx>=0\) console.log\('Found at line',idx+1\); else console.log\('Not found'\);")
